jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Paytm
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
